items.title: Moment cooling tower is demolished at German power plant
items.dek: Onlookers watched as the cooling tower of the decommissioned Frimmersdorf power plant in Germany collapsed.
items.body: Onlookers watched as the cooling tower of the decommissioned Frimmersdorf power plant in Germany collapsed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: At least 10 FBI staffers connected to Trump investigations fired
items.dek: The terminated FBI staffers all participated in a probe into Trump's handling of classified documents after his first term.
items.body: The terminated FBI staffers all participated in a probe into Trump's handling of classified documents after his first term.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: AfD hails court injunction on 'extremist' label as victory
items.dek: The ruling is temporary, but party co-leader Alice Weidel has already described it as a "major victory".
items.body: The ruling is temporary, but party co-leader Alice Weidel has already described it as a "major victory".
items.author: IriLine Desk
